This aligns with established guidelines where Methotrexate remains the principal pharmaceutical intervention under specific conditions. While Misoprostol may have roles in obstetric settings such as induction of labor or managing postpartum hemorrhage, its application in addressing ectopic pregnancies lacks both evidentiary support and widespread acceptance within current therapeutic protocols.
